title: (BUG) Remote account self-delete fails on FK: favourites/bookmarks referencing remote_posts
description: inbox.rs handle_delete for actor self-deletion (lines 1177-1213) deletes remote_posts belonging to the actor, but never cleans up rows in favourites or bookmarks that have remote_post_id referencing those posts. Both tables have `remote_post_id INTEGER REFERENCES remote_posts(id)` without ON DELETE CASCADE. With foreign_keys=true, the `DELETE FROM remote_posts WHERE remote_account_id = ?` will fail with a FK constraint violation if any local user has favourited or bookmarked one of the actor's posts. Additionally, the notification cleanup (line 1177) only deletes by from_remote_account_id — not by remote_post_id — so notifications with a remote_post_id FK to the deleted posts also block the delete.
